text:
The mode is the value that appears most frequently. In the list `xs = [1,2,2,3,3,3,4,4,4,4]`, the number 4 appears 4 times, which is more than any other number.  

```python
xs = [1,2,2,3,3,3,4,4,4,4]
from collections import Counter
counts = Counter(xs)
mode = max(counts, key=counts.get)
print(mode)
```
